results.title: World Cup manager with job under threat snaps at female reporter
results.description: Many managers have lost their positions at the 2026 World Cup, and one boss whose nation were dumped out the tournament this week appears to be feeling the pressure around his future

results.title: Alapag returns to PBA to lead NLEX Road Warriors
results.description: The former PBA Most Valuable Player takes over as head coach of NLEX, beginning with the 2026 PBA Governors' Cup, after six years in the U.S., including a stint with the NBA'. Sacramento Kings.
